Formerly: PLSC100.

PLSC111 Introduction to Horticulture Laboratory (1 Credit)

The goal of this course is to expand your knowledge of the growth and development of horticultural crops. An integrated understanding of horticulture will come from laboratory experiments and field trips. This course is designed to complement lecture material from PLSC 110. Corequisite: PLSC110 or permission of the Department of Plant Science and Landscape Architecture.
